name: sovai
description: Autonomous execution mode — executes any plan to completion without user interruptions, checkpoints, or confirmations. Builds via a decompose→execute→review Workflow engine (Opus decomposes the plan, Sonnets build in parallel, a second Opus reviews completeness+cohesion and feeds back). Skips blocked items (no silent workarounds), logs all decisions, runs a final headless qa-loop pass, regenerates docs (project-doc) and commits + pushes the work, and delivers the final report as an interactive /visual HTML review surface (markdown fallback).
